body.title: CLOSED: Add --actionable flag to cc_queue.py list for Akien-facing items
body.result: Added --actionable flag to list subcommand: filters to status in {sprint,design,akien,awaiting_approval,approval}, worker!=igor, gate null or pointing to closed ticket. _gate_clear helper added. 14 tests green.
body.description:
Akien needs a filtered queue view showing only tickets they can act on right now. --actionable filter: status in {sprint, design, akien, awaiting_approval} AND (gate=null OR gate ticket is closed/done) AND worker != igor. This covers: ready-to-build items, tickets needing design decisions, open questions, ideas, and approval-pending items. Everything requiring a human decision surfaces; everything blocked or worker=igor stays hidden.

**Affected files:** `~/TheIgors/lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py`
**Design rules:** backward-compat (no flag = existing list behavior unchanged); gate-resolved check reads same queue.json; no SQLite
**Scope boundary:** --actionable flag on `list` subcommand only. No schema changes. No display changes to unfiltered output. worker=igor exclusion uses existing worker field.
**Test plan:** `list --actionable` excludes a ticket whose gate points to an open ticket; includes a design-status ticket; includes an awaiting_approval ticket; excludes a worker=igor sprint ticket; includes a sprint ticket with null gate. `list` without flag still shows all tickets unchanged.
